evals.prompt: I have an iOS app using AVFoundation's AVCaptureMetadataOutput for barcode scanning. I want to replace it with BarcodeCapture. Here is my view controller: AVFoundationViewController.swift
evals.expected_output: Removes all AVFoundation barcode-scanning APIs (AVCaptureSession, AVCaptureMetadataOutput, AVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate, AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer), adds BarcodeCapture integration with matching symbologies (.ean13UPCA, .code128, .qr), preserves ScannedBarcode struct and deduplication logic.

assertions.text: import AVFoundation is NOT present in the output (may appear in a before/after summary table)
AVCaptureSession is NOT instantiated in the new code
AVCaptureMetadataOutput is NOT instantiated in the new code
AVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate conformance is NOT present on the view controller in the new code
AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer is NOT present in the new code
import ScanditBarcodeCapture IS present
BarcodeCaptureListener conformance is present
Symbology .ean13UPCA is enabled (not .ean13)
Symbology .code128 is enabled
Symbology .qr is enabled (not .qrCode, which does not exist as a Swift case)
DataCaptureView(context:frame:) is used and added as a subview
BarcodeCaptureOverlay(barcodeCapture:view:) is called
viewWillAppear turns the camera on (camera?.switch(toDesiredState: .on))
viewWillDisappear turns the camera off (camera?.switch(toDesiredState: .off))
ScannedBarcode struct is preserved in the output
scannedBarcodes array is preserved in the output
Deduplication logic (checking for existing value before appending) is preserved
A summary of changes is shown with what was removed and what was added
Setup checklist mentions adding the SDK via Swift Package Manager (datacapture-spm)
Setup checklist mentions NSCameraUsageDescription in Info.plist
